summary: Iteration 158: AWS KMS / Vault Integration + PII Masking - All 20 tests passed. Verified: (1) Login returns access_token, (2) PII policy with 31 fields and 4 categories, (3) 7 secret type classifications with lifecycle rules, (4) Secret inventory, (5) KMS status (unavailable in dev as expected), (6) PII audit trail, (7) PII anomaly detection, (8) PII metrics, (9) Guests endpoint not broken, (10) Secrets status endpoint, (11) mask_dict role-based masking logic.
critical_code_review_comments: PII Registry correctly defines 31 fields across 4 categories (identity, contact, financial, authentication)
7 SecretType classifications with proper lifecycle rules (rotation_max_days, auto_rotation, requires_restart, backup_required)
mask_dict correctly implements role-based masking: anonymous sees masked, admin sees email/phone, super_admin sees all except passwords
Passwords are ALWAYS masked regardless of role (unmask_roles=frozenset() for password fields)
KMS envelope encryption provider correctly reports 'unavailable' when AWS_KMS_KEY_ARN not set
Log sanitizer (SanitizedLogFilter) attached to root logger handlers for automatic PII scrubbing
PII masking is application-layer (not middleware) to avoid GZip compression conflicts - correct design decision
Raw webhook payload endpoints (/api/ops/timeline/raw-payload/*) correctly mask PII using mask_dict
All /api/ops/* endpoints protected by require_ops_access guard (super_admin, admin, operator, manager roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 158 verified AWS KMS / Vault integration + PII masking implementation. All 11 requested endpoints tested and working: (1) POST /api/auth/login returns access_token, (2) GET /api/ops/pii/policy returns 31 PII fields in 4 categories, (3) GET /api/ops/secrets/classification returns 7 secret types with lifecycle rules, (4) GET /api/ops/secrets/inventory returns 4 secrets in dev environment, (5) GET /api/ops/kms/status returns 'unavailable' (expected - no AWS_KMS_KEY_ARN), (6) GET /api/ops/pii/audit returns empty trail initially, (7) GET /api/ops/pii/anomalies returns 0 anomalies, (8) GET /api/ops/pii/metrics returns 31 fields registered, (9) GET /api/pms/guests works correctly, (10) GET /api/ops/secrets/status returns healthy local_dev provider. PII masking logic verified: mask_dict correctly masks email/phone/identity by role, passwords always masked.

log_sanitizer.patterns: email, credit card, phone, JWT, AWS keys, API keys, etc.

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are backed by real MongoDB queries. KMS is unavailable in dev (expected behavior when AWS_KMS_KEY_ARN not set).
